description: Execute a plan until it is complete

content: Please read AGENTS.md and follow its instructions. Read `codeInfoStatus/flow-state/current-plan.json` first and use only the relative `plan_path` stored there as the active plan for this flow. Verify that the selected plan file exists and that the story number in the current branch name matches the story number in the selected plan filename. If those do not match, stop and say the current-plan handoff is stale and must be regenerated. Do NOT use code_info tools for plan selection and do NOT independently search for or select a different plan. Confirm to me what story that selected plan is, and provide me with an overview of the story, including what is still remaining to be done, without making file changes at this time.
If possible, git push the branch.
